array.string:
ENV_FILE=/Users/feresa/.config/echodataflow/services.env [[ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]] || { echo "Missing $ENV_FILE"; exit 1; }
set -a source "$ENV_FILE" set +a
DB_PATH="${PREFECT_DB_PATH:-$HOME/.prefect/prefect.db}" AUTO_RESET="${PREFECT_DB_AUTORESET_ON_FAILURE:-false}"
if [[ -f "$DB_PATH" ]]; then DB_CHECK="$(sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" "PRAGMA quick_check;" 2>/dev/null || true)" if [[ "$DB_CHECK" != "ok" ]]; then echo "Prefect DB health check failed for $DB_PATH: ${DB_CHECK:-no output}" if [[ "$AUTO_RESET" == "true" ]]; then ts="$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)" backup_dir="$HOME/.prefect/db-backups/$ts" mkdir -p "$backup_dir" mv "${DB_PATH}"* "$backup_dir"/ 2>/dev/null || true echo "Archived DB files to $backup_dir" else echo "Set PREFECT_DB_AUTORESET_ON_FAILURE=true in services.env to auto-archive and reset." exit 1 fi fi fi
exec "$MAMBA_BIN" run -n "$ECHODATAFLOW_ENV" prefect server start --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4200
